reference: Hi, thank you for reaching out to me. I really appreciate you sharing your problem. In my opinion, it is better to see an ear, nose, and throat surgeon first. If that examination also comes back unremarkable, then this could be auditory hallucination, and for that, you would need to see a psychiatrist. I hope this information helps. Have a good day.
text: Hi, thank you for reaching out to me. I really appreciate you sharing your problem. In my opinion, it is better to see an ear, nose, and throat surgeon first. If that examination also comes back unremarkable, then this could be auditory hallucination, and for that, you need to see a psychiatrist. I hope this information helps. Have a good day.
